user_query:
Research the topics listed in input/keywords.csv using a local, privacy‑respecting metasearch capability. For each keyword:
- Run two separate category searches: news and it.
- Use language filter en-US for all searches.
- For at least one keyword, fetch two pages of results (pageno 1 and 2) to compare pagination.

Produce these deliverables under output/:
1) output/raw_results.jsonl
   - One JSON object per line with fields: keyword (string), category ("news" or "it"), pageno (number), title (string), url (string), content (string snippet), engines (array of strings), score (number).
   - Aggregate at least 20 total results across all keywords.
   - Deduplicate by exact URL within each (keyword, category) set; do not include the same URL twice for the same keyword and category.

2) output/domains.csv
   - Columns: keyword,domain,count
   - Derive domain from each result URL (e.g., host part of the URL, lowercased, without scheme or path).
   - Count occurrences per keyword. Include at least 10 data rows (excluding header) overall.

3) output/queries.json
   - Record every query you ran with structure:
     {
       "language": "en-US",
       "keywords": [
         {
           "keyword": "...",
           "queries": [
             {"q": "<the actual search string>", "categories": "news", "pageno": 1, "timestamp": "<ISO-8601>", "notes": "..."},
             {"q": "<the actual search string>", "categories": "it", "pageno": 1, "timestamp": "<ISO-8601>", "notes": "..."}
           ]
         }
       ],
       "endpoint_used": "local_metasearch"
     }
   - Ensure at least one keyword has both pageno 1 and pageno 2 recorded for a category.

4) output/summary.md
   - A concise write‑up (plain text) with the following section headings exactly:
     - Methodology
     - Top Findings
     - Gaps & Next Steps
   - In Methodology, explicitly state that you used categories "news" and "it" and language "en-US", and that you deduplicated by exact URL.

General requirements:
- Favor high‑relevance results and include engines and score values returned by the search capability when available.
- Sort results within each (keyword, category, pageno) by descending score before exporting.
- Use only relative paths provided above for all file I/O.
